title: Evident's QoL Modpack
description: These are my favorite mods using Fabric Launcher. They change the came completely, streamlining hotkeys and great tools for the hard core player.
body:
This Modpack includes all of my favorite Fabric mods, especially for SMP servers. They change the game completely for the better, streamlining hotkeys, leveling up your UI, and some really great tools for any SMP or solo miners and crafters everywhere. I created this mod for the friends on my SMP world, but wanted to share it with everyone. These are all client sided mods only and none of them require any server side mods to work, so they are safe to use on Vanilla servers. 

All of the mods in this pack are part of the Modrinth Library, if you experience issues with this pack feel free to reach out to me on Discord, **Username: Evident**. For issues with a specific mod, please reach out to the mod creator directly as I will only be updating the Mod Pack to ensure compatibility for the entire list. Some mods might get added or removed/replaced over time as the Minecraft updates. 

### Modlist:

 - **Apple Skin** - Add's Food Saturation to your Health Bar. 
 - **BSL Shaders** - Can be enabled in the video settings, for fancy graphics cards only. 
 - **Better Third Person** - Moves the camera angle of 3rd person to a better angle by default, and gives you more 3rd person control over the camera.
 - **Better F3** - An F3 page with additional information and color coordination. 
 -  **Borderless Mining** - Fullscreen Mode is now Borderless Windowed mode, allowing players with dual screens to click out without the game minimizing all the time. 
 -  **Chat Heads** - See player head in chat!
 -  **Cloth Config API** - API used by mods in this pack
 -  **Clumps** - Improve FPS at XP Farms by clumping together all those balls of XP!
 -  **CraftPresence** - Discord Presence Mod (Might get overwritten by Modrinth's own presence, currently testing)
 -  **Dark Loading Screen** - Customize your loading screen colors, but the default looks great!
 -  **Fabric API** - API used by mods in this pack
 -  **Indium** - Sodium addon mods to use the Fabric Rendering API. 
 -  **Inventory HUD+** - Adds your Inventory, Armor, and Enhancements to your HUD. Fully Customizable.
 -  **Iris** - Adds support for Shaders
 -  **Mod Menu** - Stop looking for the hot keys to get into your mod menu's, now they are just part of your regular menu!
 -  **Mouse Wheelie** - Minecraft controls the way they should have always been... Life changing hotkeys for the serious miner and crafter...
 -  **Quick Menu** Menu for your most common / commands
 -  **Sodium** Major GPU improvements, additional video settings.
 -  **Xaero's Minimap** - A mod with customizable minimap. 
 - **Xaero's World Map** - Adds a world map to your M key. Works with the Minimap for a complete experience.
